macro.description: Define a reusable template function that can accept arguments and return rendered output.
macro.caveat: Macros perform no type checking. Variables defined inside a macro are local. Recursive macros may cause stack overflows.

call.description: Invoke a macro and pass a block of template content as a callable via the special caller() function.
call.caveat: The macro must explicitly call caller() to render the block. Call blocks introduce additional rendering overhead.

set.syntax: {% set name = value %} | {% set name %}...{% endset %}
set.description: Assign a value to a variable within the template. Supports both single-line assignment and block assignment.
set.caveat: Assignments are scoped to the current context. Block assignments capture rendered text, not expressions.
